full_text:
Guo Sheng 郭勝
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Sheng (郭勝). Warned close friend He Jin about Jian Shi’s plot. Killed by Yuan Shao and Cao Cao. Guo Sheng was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Guo Sheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
